== Notes for [[Item:Q3319|Q3319]] ==

Francisco de Santa Cruz arrived to Nueva Espana in 1519 along with Panfilo de Narvaez and became conquistador of Michoacán along with Hernán Cortés.

Francisco de Santa Cruz was mayordomo of Hernan Cortes in his agricultural companies between 1531 and 1534; and then mayordomo of the Marquesado del Valle, in charge of the sugar mills in Tlatenango by 1536.

He was regidor of the city of Mexico in 1531, mayor of the city of Mexico in 1546 and judge of Tutelas in 1550. He was married to Isabel de Orduña, daughter of conquistador of Mexico and Governor of Guatemala, Francisco de Orduña with whom he had 3 sons (who did not marry and left no descendance) and 3 daughters, two of them marrying conquistadors.

http://dbe.rah.es/biografias/51341/francisco-de-santa-cruz

https://books.google.se/books?id=E-liDwAAQBAJ&pg=PA89&dq=Estefania+de+Velasco+Francisco+Santa+Cruz&hl=en&sa=X&ved=0ahUKEwift7TlotzfAhWihqYKHYfMBrYQ6AEILTAA#v=onepage&q=Estefania%20de%20Velasco%20Francisco%20Santa%20Cruz&f=false Pag. 75-92

https://books.google.se/books?id=E-liDwAAQBAJ&pg=PA89&lpg=PA89&dq=Francisco+de+Santa+Cruz+Polanco+Catalina&source=bl&ots=yvYAEj6hhq&sig=L5T5ZjIxIrKTTlgoMGZejpvZf4M&hl=en&sa=X&ved=2ahUKEwik6p3kuuPeAhVC1SwKHRAeBg44ChDoATAEegQIAhAB#v=onepage&q=Francisco%20de%20Santa%20Cruz%20Polanco%20Catalina&f=false Page 89

https://books.google.se/books?id=Pz9NCgAAQBAJ&pg=PA241&lpg=PA241&dq=francisco+de+santa+cruz+catalina+salamanca&source=bl&ots=9oBjQrd2-H&sig=5fL8JWEKS0X7OEWBuFeXdP_MTxA&hl=en&sa=X&ved=2ahUKEwjZsoCRoOPeAhVMkiwKHYEEDCcQ6AEwBXoECAAQAQ#v=onepage&q=francisco%20de%20santa%20cruz%20catalina%20salamanca&f=false Page 241

His full name was Francisco de Santa Cruz Polanco according to various AGI sources such as http://www.archivesportaleurope.net/ead-display/-/ead/pl/aicode/ES-41091-AGI10/type/fa/id/ES-41091-AGI-UD-1859526/unitid/ES-41091-AGI-UD-1859526+-+ES-41091-AGI-UD-371226/search/0/Polanco

His father was indeed Francisco de Santa Cruz Polanco http://www.archivesportaleurope.net/ead-display/-/ead/pl/aicode/ES-41091-AGI10/type/fa/id/ES-41091-AGI-UD-1916099/unitid/ES-41091-AGI-UD-1916099+-+ES-41091-AGI-UD-122362/search/0/francisco+de+santa+cruz+polanco

Information of Merits of Francisco de Santa Cruz Polanco- http://pares.mcu.es/ParesBusquedas20/catalogo/description/123183 http://pares.mcu.es/ParesBusquedas20/catalogo/show/123094



----

http://pares.mcu.es/ParesBusquedas20/catalogo/description/237400

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
67051ADA7711F1EFBBFA9822EF79916C9CF6
geni:6000000009836418667


[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
